title: Open-AoE: An Open Egocentric Manipulation Dataset and Toolchain for Embodied Learning
innovation_summary: Open-AoE: An Open Egocentric Manipulation Dataset and Toolchain for Embodied Learning: We present Open-AoE, an open, community-oriented egocentric manipulation dataset and toolchain spanning the full pipeline from smartphone capture to model training.
